message:
test(messaging): add 41 property-based tests for FABRIC invariants

proptest coverage for subject routing consistency, CRDT commutativity/
associativity/idempotence, delta roundtrips, morphism transform algebra,
pattern overlap symmetry, shard distribution, obligation lifecycle
linearity, and capability monotonicity.

Closes asupersync-8w83i.17.5.
